{{Quote|Director Scaur is big on redundancy.|Wraw|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref>}}
'''Dif Scaur''' was a member of the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]]. Originally an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the [[New Republic Fourth Fleet|Fourth Battle Group]], Scaur was appointed Director of [[New Republic Intelligence Service]] when [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] retired. While frail looking, he had a very commanding voice. Scaur worked with [[Alpha Blue]] and the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] to form [[Alpha Red]], a bioweapon designed to attack the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] at a molecular level. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and a number of government officials opposed this, and [[Cal Omas]] was persuaded to halt the project after the [[Battle of Ebaq|victory]] at [[Ebaq 9]]. Scaur was quietly forced to resign by Omas after the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]] and the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==Behind the scenes==
Dif Scaur was mentioned in the original [[N.R.I. Reports]] on the ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' website as then head of New Republic Intelligence. It also made mention of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].<ref name="JCF">{{JCFCite|url=posts/5398124|board=Literature|thread=The Official Kyle Katarn and Dark Forces Discussion Thread ( Spoilers when appropriate )|user=Valiento|date=2002-01-16|time=12:02 AM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200802152041/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-kyle-katarn-and-dark-forces-discussion-thread-spoilers-when-appropriate.4028947/page-8}}</ref> However, his name and the war were removed from later updates to the site.
